bool llvm::isSafeToLoadUnconditionally (Value *V, Instruction *ScanFrom, unsigned Align, const DataLayout *TD=nullptr)
 Check if executing a load of this pointer value cannot trap.
Value * llvm::FindAvailableLoadedValue (Value *Ptr, BasicBlock *ScanBB, BasicBlock::iterator &ScanFrom, unsigned MaxInstsToScan=6, AliasAnalysis *AA=nullptr, AAMDNodes *AATags=nullptr)
 Scan the ScanBB block backwards to see if we have the value at the memory address *Ptr locally available within a small number of instructions.
